title: Complete Replacement Shaver Head Compatible with Philips Norel*o Series 9000 & SH90 Models (S9311/27, S9311/84, S9511/63, S9721/84 etc.) – Metal Wheel Buckle, Upgraded Double Precision Blades, Durable

features: 【Wide Compatibility】Compatible with Philips Norel*o Series 9000 shavers, fully compatible with SH90 model and various S9000 series (including S9311/27, S9311/84, S9511/63, S9721/84, etc.). A versatile replacement head for multiple shaver models.
【Premium Material】Made of high-quality stainless steel with dual-layer rotary blades. Glides smoothly along facial contours for a close, comfortable shave without skin irritation.

【Easy Installation】Integrated head-and-base design allows quick replacement—just remove the old head and snap on the new one. No blade assembly needed, restoring your shaver’s peak performance in seconds.
【Sharp & Long-Lasting】Upgraded double-layer stainless steel blades enhance sharpness and durability. For optimal performance, we recommend replacing the head every 12 months.
【Complete Kit】Includes 1 shaver head + 1 cleaning brush for convenient maintenance. Backed by reliable customer support—contact us if you have any questions, and we’ll assist you promptly.
description: Product Description Sh90 replacement heads for Philips Norelco shaver series 9000 Replacement shaving heads Series 9000 (S9311/27, S9311/84, S9311/87, S9321/88, S9511/63, S9531/84, S9721/84, S9721/87, S9721/89). You can easily clean your shaving heads by removing the upper part of the shaving head and rinsing it under running water. allows each shaving head to move in eight directions to achieve a clean shave in fewer strokes. For optimum performance, you should replace your Norelco 9000 Series replacement shaving heads every 12 months. Restore the efficiency of your shaver with the 9000 series replacement shaving heads. These SH90 replacement blades gently position each hair at an ideal cutting angle for a smooth shave.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Attention: This electric shaver has rotating blades that can cause cuts if not handled with care. In addition, it is battery powered, so care must be taken when charging. Always follow the product safety instructions to avoid injury.
